heading: Providing engraved plates of portraits of deceased members of Congress
label: 5155 Providing engraved plates of portraits of deceased members of Congress
text: On conditions the Secretary of the Treasury decides, the Secretary may send an engraved plate of a portrait of a deceased Senator or Representative to an heir or legal representative of such a Senator or Representative.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)515531:175.(3d par. on p. 275), .July 1, 1916, ch. 209, § 139 Stat. 275The words “terms and” are omitted as being included in “conditions”. The words “that have been or may be made” are omitted as unnecessary.
